headers_0.name: header1
headers_1.name: header2
scenario: The response containing a delivery report for a record produced to a topic. In streaming mode, for each record sent, a separate delivery report will be returned, in the same order, each with its own error_code.

headers_0.name: header3
headers_1.name: header4
scenario: Indicates a bad request error. It could be caused by an unexpected request body format or other forms of request validation failure.

headers_0.name: header5
headers_1.name: header6
scenario: Indicates a client authentication error. Kafka authentication failures will contain error code 40101 in the response body.

headers_0.name: header7
headers_1.name: header8
scenario: Indicates a client authorization error. Kafka authorization failures will contain error code 40301 in the response body.

headers_0.name: header9
headers_1.name: header10
scenario: Indicates attempted access to an unreachable or non-existing resource like e.g. an unknown topic or partition. GET requests to endpoints not allowed in the accesslists will also result in this response.
